name: Beef Satay
recipeInstructions:
1. To make peanut sauce, heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a saucepan. Add onion and garlic and fry gently until golden.
2. Stir in chili powder, curry powder, water, peanut butter, and brown sugar. Bring to a boil; simmer gently until thickened.
3. Stir in soy sauce and lemon juice, then salt and pepper. Turn the mixture into a serving dish.
4. Preheat broiler. Grease a broiler pan. Trim and cut meat into 1/2-inch cubes. Thread (not too tightly) onto 8 bamboo skewers, leaving space at each end for holding. Cover ends with small pieces of foil to prevent burning. Place skewers in greased broiler pan. Brush with remaining 1 tablespoon oil.
5. Cook under preheated broiler 10-15 minutes until golden and cooked through. Turn and brush frequently with oil during cooking.
6. Garnish with lemon pieces and cilantro sprigs, if desired, and serve hot with peanut sauce.
